query: How do I reset my password?
ground_truth: You can reset your password through the self-service portal at https://passwordreset.contoso.com. You will need to verify your identity using MFA (Microsoft Authenticator). If your account is locked out, contact the helpdesk directly at itsupport@contoso.com or call +1-800-555-0199.
context: Password resets: Self-service via https://passwordreset.contoso.com. Requires MFA. If locked out, contact the helpdesk. Account lockout: After 5 failed attempts the account locks for 30 minutes. Helpdesk can unlock immediately.

query: How do I connect to the VPN?
ground_truth: To connect to the Contoso VPN: 1) Launch the Contoso VPN Client v4.2 or later, 2) Sign in with your Entra ID credentials, 3) Select the nearest gateway, 4) Click Connect. Split tunneling is enabled by default, so internal apps (*.contoso.com) route through VPN while other traffic goes direct. Ensure outbound UDP 443 and TCP 8443 are open on your network.
context: Supported client: Contoso VPN Client v4.2+ (Windows, macOS, Linux). Connection steps: Launch client, sign in with Entra ID, select nearest gateway, connect. Split tunneling: Enabled by default. Firewall ports: Outbound UDP 443 and TCP 8443 must be open.

query: I need to install Docker Desktop on my work laptop
ground_truth: Docker Desktop is available in the Software Catalog but requires Security team approval in addition to your manager's approval. Submit a request in ServiceNow under Request Items, select Docker Desktop, and provide a business justification. The SLA for privileged software is 3 business days after all approvals are received.
context: Approvals: manager (all requests) + Security team (for privileged tools like Wireshark, Postman, Docker Desktop). SLA: privileged software within 3 business days. Docker Desktop 4.x requires Security approval.

query: My laptop is broken and I need a replacement
ground_truth: Submit a hardware replacement request in ServiceNow. A replacement laptop will be provisioned within 3 business days. You must return your old device within 5 days of receiving the new one. If you need a device immediately, you can pick up a loaner laptop the same day from the IT vending kiosk in Building 3, Floor 1. Loaners are available for up to 14 days.
context: Laptop replacement: Submit hardware request in ServiceNow. Old device must be returned within 5 days. SLA: 3 business days. Loaner equipment: Available for up to 14 days. Extensions require director approval. Same day pickup.

query: What is the escalation process for a critical outage?
ground_truth: A critical outage (Priority 1) affecting more than 50 users has a 15-minute response SLA and auto-escalates to the on-call engineer. The escalation path is: L1 Helpdesk → L2 Engineering → L3 Platform Team → VP of IT. For Priority 1 incidents, weekend on-call support is available. Report critical outages immediately via phone at +1-800-555-0199.
context: Priority 1 (Critical): Service outage affecting >50 users. Response: 15 minutes. Auto-escalates to on-call engineer. Escalation path: L1 Helpdesk → L2 Engineering → L3 Platform Team → VP of IT (for Priority 1 only). Weekend on-call for Priority 1 only.

query: Can I use Zoom for meetings?
ground_truth: Zoom is not a supported application at Contoso. Please use Microsoft Teams instead for all meetings and video calls. Teams is auto-updated via Intune and the desktop app is required for meetings. If you have specific collaboration needs not met by Teams, you can submit a 'New Software Evaluation' request in ServiceNow, though evaluation takes up to 10 business days.
context: Zoom: Not supported. Use Teams instead. Microsoft Teams: Latest version, Desktop app required for meetings. Unsupported software: submit a New Software Evaluation request. Evaluation takes up to 10 business days.
